name: Old Fashioned Milk Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup sugar (partly brown, more white than brown)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sugar, flour, and salt in the pie shell with your fingers.
2. Add half a cup of cream to the mixture.
3. Stir in another half cup of cream until well combined.
4. Pour in milk.
5. Sprinkle nutmeg over the filling.
6. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes.
7. Reduce temperature to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and bake for an additional 40 minutes.
